reviews.comment:
Habitación 10 puntos. Super cómoda,limpia y calentita !! El personal de la YPF exelente trato ofreciendo ser socios de ACA. Todo impecable.

(Translated by Google)
Room 10/10. Super comfortable, clean, and warm! The YPF staff were excellent, offering ACA memberships. Everything was spotless.

reviews.comment:
La milanesa estaba tan dura como la infancia en africa.
Y mucha mala onda los empleados.

(Translated by Google)
The breaded cutlet was as tough as childhood in Africa.

And the staff were really unfriendly.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de su personal.
Lastima la App de YPF, siempre falla a la hora de pagar, la verdad un contratiempo imperdonable de parte de YPF que no solucionan estos problemas

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from their staff. It's a shame about the YPF app; it always fails when it comes to payments. Honestly, it's an unforgivable oversight on YPF's part that they don't fix these problems.
